notes:
[CUTSCENES WORK]

Game mostly works out of the box. First played on the DX9 branch but had moderate frame lag (same as Windows). Switched to DX8 branch and had no more lag. Startup logos and cutscenes work just fine after installing LAVfilters with WINE while specifying the game's prefix. DS4 gamepad works fine as well.

If not for having to install LAVfilters, it would be platinum.
title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails in the Sky SC

notes: In general the game works fine except for videos. Running `protontricks 251290 directshow` & installing K-Lite Codec Pack Basic into the prefix allowed all videos to work. This worked perfectly for 55 hours, until 2 of the final boss fights caused a CTD "Unhandled exception: page fault". I moved past these sections by booting into windows. The final piece of gameplay and video worked fine.
title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails in the Sky SC
